bundle.shortDescription: Windows-native multi-agent terminal for AI coding workflows over SSH
bundle.longDescription: winmux is a Windows-native multi-agent terminal optimized for AI coding workflows over SSH, inspired by cmux. Ships a tunnel-aware CLI on remote Linux servers so AI agents can pipe permission requests and lifecycle events back to the desktop UI for explicit Allow/Deny decisions.
